description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story layout with a flat roof and a minimalist design, characterized by clean lines and a monochrome color palette. The main building is accompanied by a detached garage, a driveway, and a rectangular swimming pool set in a spacious green lawn. The front facade displays large glass doors and windows, while the rear and sides have fewer openings, emphasizing privacy. Outdoor amenities include a paved patio area with lounge chairs and a small garden space. The garage is constructed with a similar modern aesthetic, and a red car is parked in the driveway. The interior layout is open-plan, with visible kitchen, living, and bedroom areas, and the property is surrounded by a simple, open yard.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, a detached garage, a swimming pool, and a spacious green yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass doors, driveway, detached garage, and pool area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the open backyard, pool, lounge chairs, and the back of the bungalow with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the long, windowless wall of the bungalow, the pool, and the garage in the background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage entrance, driveway, and the side of the bungalow with visible interior layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing glass doors and minimal side windows
